creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: ak
Date: Mon Jun 10 14:58:30 2013
New Revision: 320484
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/320484

Log:
  - Fix pkg-plist
  - Switch to PORTDOCS
  
  PR:	ports/178777
  Submitted by:	Kevin Zheng <kevinz5000@gmail.com>
  Approved by:	maintainer timeout (20 days)

Modified:
  head/games/boswars/Makefile
  head/games/boswars/pkg-plist   (contents, props changed)

Modified: head/games/boswars/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/games/boswars/Makefile	Mon Jun 10 14:38:18 2013	(r320483)
+++ head/games/boswars/Makefile	Mon Jun 10 14:58:30 2013	(r320484)
@@ -29,6 +29,8 @@ CFLAGS+=	-DSTRATAGUS_LIB_PATH='"\"${DATA
 DESKTOP_ENTRIES=	"Bos Wars" "${COMMENT}" "" \
 			"boswars" "Game;StrategyGame;" false
 
+PORTDOCS=	*
+
 .include <bsd.port.options.mk>
 
 post-patch:
@@ -48,7 +50,7 @@ do-install:
 .if ${PORT_OPTIONS:MDOCS}
 	${MKDIR} ${DOCSDIR}
 	${INSTALL_DATA} ${WRKSRC}/CHANGELOG ${WRKSRC}/README.txt ${DOCSDIR}
-	${CP} -R ${WRKSRC}/doc/* ${DOCSDIR}
+	${COPYTREE_SHARE} ${WRKSRC}/doc/* ${DOCSDIR}
 .endif
 
 .include <bsd.port.mk>

==============================================================================
